name: Enigma
bio: Enigma is Michael Cretu's studio project, known for turning atmospheric production, chant sampling, and crossover pop into a catalog that still travels across streaming and sync contexts.
notable_for: Ambient-pop crossover, global catalog longevity, and cinematic mood-driven listening.
career_highlight: The project's early 1990s breakthroughs created a catalog that still earns through streaming, nostalgia, and visual-media compatibility.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes continued streaming around the best-known singles, international catalog demand, and creator-side participation through the studio-project structure.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and creator-affiliated royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears tied closely to songwriter and producer interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No major catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: As a studio-led catalog, Enigma may retain better creator economics than a typical performer-only legacy act.
